content.text:
projections:
  - position: 1
    system: "elastic"
    template: "doc-fetch-falco-alert / falco-container-timeline / launch-network-tool-container / container-timeline-summary"
    events:
      - agent:
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
          type: "filebeat"
          ephemeral_id: "eph-0001-soc-playground"
          version: "8.13.0"
        log:
          file:
            path: "/var/log/falco/alerts.json"
          offset: 0
        elastic_agent:
          id: "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
          version: "8.13.0"
          snapshot: false
        message: "Warning Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container (user=svc.monitoring user_loginuid=1009 command=nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port> parent=bash pcmdline=bash container=ffbff1299702 image=<container-image>)"
        cloud:
          availability_zone: "us-east-1a"
          instance:
            name: "soc-playground"
            id: "i-soc-playground-01"
          provider: "aws"
          service:
            name: "ec2"
          region: "us-east-1"
        input:
          type: "log"
        "@timestamp": "2026-06-04T14:00:54.976Z"
        ecs:
          version: "8.11.0"
        data_stream:
          namespace: "default"
          type: "logs"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"
        falco:
          output: "Warning Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container (user=svc.monitoring user_loginuid=1009 command=nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port> parent=bash pcmdline=bash container=ffbff1299702 image=<container-image>)"
          output_fields:
            user.uid: 1009
            proc.pname: "bash"
            evt.type: "connect"
            proc.cmdline: "nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port>"
            user.name: "svc.monitoring"
            proc.exepath: "/usr/bin/nc"
            container.id: "ffbff1299702"
            evt.arg.flags: "BPF_F_ALLOW_OVERRIDE"
            user.loginuid: 1009
            container.name: "ffbff1299702"
            container.image.repository: null
            proc.name: "nc"
            proc.tty: 0
            evt.time: 1749045654976000000
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          rule: "Launch Suspicious Network Tool in Container"
          source: "syscall"
          time: "2026-06-04T14:00:54.976Z"
          priority: "Warning"
          tags:
            - "network"
            - "container"
            - "mitre_execution"
        host:
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          os:
            kernel: "5.15.0-1045-aws"
            codename: "jammy"
            name: "Ubuntu"
            family: "debian"
            type: "linux"
            version: "22.04.3 LTS"
            platform: "ubuntu"
          containerized: false
          ip:
            - "172.18.0.1"
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "soc-playground-host-id"
          mac:
            - "02:42:ac:12:00:01"
          architecture: "x86_64"
        event:
          agent_id_status: "verified"
          ingested: "2026-06-04T14:00:55.100Z"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"
      - agent:
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
          type: "filebeat"
          ephemeral_id: "eph-0001-soc-playground"
          version: "8.13.0"
        log:
          file:
            path: "/var/log/falco/alerts.json"
          offset: 1024
        elastic_agent:
          id: "a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890-abcd-ef1234567890"
          version: "8.13.0"
          snapshot: false
        message: "Warning Write below monitored dir (user=svc.monitoring user_loginuid=1009 command=bash -c echo >> /root/.ssh/authorized_keys parent=bash container=ffbff1299702)"
        cloud:
          availability_zone: "us-east-1a"
          instance:
            name: "soc-playground"
            id: "i-soc-playground-01"
          provider: "aws"
          service:
            name: "ec2"
          region: "us-east-1"
        input:
          type: "log"
        "@timestamp": "2026-06-04T14:01:12.340Z"
        ecs:
          version: "8.11.0"
        data_stream:
          namespace: "default"
          type: "logs"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"
        falco:
          output: "Warning Write below monitored dir (user=svc.monitoring user_loginuid=1009 command=bash -c echo >> /root/.ssh/authorized_keys parent=bash container=ffbff1299702)"
          output_fields:
            user.uid: 1009
            proc.pname: "bash"
            evt.type: "write"
            proc.cmdline: "bash -c echo <attacker-pubkey> >> /root/.ssh/authorized_keys"
            user.name: "svc.monitoring"
            proc.exepath: "/bin/bash"
            container.id: "ffbff1299702"
            evt.arg.flags: "O_WRONLY|O_CREAT|O_APPEND"
            user.loginuid: 1009
            container.name: "ffbff1299702"
            container.image.repository: null
            proc.name: "bash"
            proc.tty: 0
            evt.time: 1749045672340000000
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          rule: "Write below monitored dir"
          source: "syscall"
          time: "2026-06-04T14:01:12.340Z"
          priority: "Warning"
          tags:
            - "filesystem"
            - "container"
            - "mitre_persistence"
        host:
          hostname: "soc-playground"
          os:
            kernel: "5.15.0-1045-aws"
            codename: "jammy"
            name: "Ubuntu"
            family: "debian"
            type: "linux"
            version: "22.04.3 LTS"
            platform: "ubuntu"
          containerized: false
          ip:
            - "172.18.0.1"
          name: "soc-playground"
          id: "soc-playground-host-id"
          mac:
            - "02:42:ac:12:00:01"
          architecture: "x86_64"
        event:
          agent_id_status: "verified"
          ingested: "2026-06-04T14:01:12.500Z"
          dataset: "falco.alerts"

  - position: 3
    system: "host-state"
    template: "container-identity-and-uid / container-metadata / container-docker-inspect / proc-tree-full"
    events:
      - container_id: "ffbff1299702"
        container_name: "<container-service-name>"
        image: "<container-image>:<container-tag>"
        uid: 1009
        username: "svc.monitoring"
        account_type: "service"
        proc_tree:
          - pid: 1
            name: "dockerd-shim"
            cmdline: "dockerd-shim"
            ppid: 0
          - pid: 812
            name: "bash"
            cmdline: "bash"
            ppid: 1
            tty: 0
          - pid: 913
            name: "nc"
            cmdline: "nc -zv 172.18.0.24 <port>"
            ppid: 812
            tty: 0
      - container_id: "ffbff1299702"
        container_name: "<container-service-name>"
        image: "<container-image>:<container-tag>"
        labels:
          role: "<container-role-label>"
          service: "svc.monitoring"
        exec_user: "svc.monitoring"
        uid: 1009
        docker_inspect:
          name: "<container-service-name>"
          image: "<container-image>:<container-tag>"
